mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, CONSENT_REQUIRED_YN, CONSENT_OPTIONAL_YN, CONSENT_DT, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId} ORDER BY IS_ACTIVE DESC, LAST_VISIT_DT DESC, REG_DT DESC

SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, CONSENT_REQUIRED_YN, CONSENT_OPTIONAL_YN, CONSENT_DT, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId} AND CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY IS_ACTIVE DESC, LAST_VISIT_DT DESC, REG_DT DESC

SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, CONSENT_REQUIRED_YN, CONSENT_OPTIONAL_YN, CONSENT_DT, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_customers (DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, IS_ACTIVE, CONSENT_YN, REG_DT, MOD_DT) VALUES (#{designerId}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{memo}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_customers SET GENDER = #{gender}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
UPDATE tb_customers SET CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, PHONE = #{phone}, GENDER = #{gender}, MEMO = #{memo}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId}

UPDATE tb_customers SET CONSENT_REQUIRED_YN = #{consentRequiredYn}, CONSENT_OPTIONAL_YN = #{consentOptionalYn}, CONSENT_DT = #{consentDt}, CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT = #{consentExpireDt}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
UPDATE tb_customers SET IS_ACTIVE = 0, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT IS NOT NULL AND CONSENT_EXPIRE_DT < NOW()
UPDATE tb_customers SET IS_ACTIVE = 1, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
